discriminative_validity.note: The battery certifies a SIMULATED transferring method (positive control) and falsifies decoupled / anti-transfer regimes -> it is not merely a negative-result wrapper. This is a SYNTHETIC feature-level validity check of the battery's decision logic; validating the measurement machinery's sensitivity on real transferring EEG methods remains future work.

harm_decomposition.note: The SELECTED OACI is softer/better-calibrated but not more accurate; combined with the C16-A target-oracle ceiling, the trajectory shows an ACCURACY<->CALIBRATION trade-off (accuracy-good checkpoints are calibration-worse). SRC anti-transfer is memorization (source NLL improves far more than target).

target_oracle.interpretation: target oracle recovers accuracy but not calibration
